title: Personalized To-Do List Generator
scenario: Create a simple to-do list template for an individual's daily tasks. The template should include a header with the person's name and a list of tasks. The tasks should be numbered and include space for notes. The output should be a formatted text string.
constraints: Use a standard font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the to-do list meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the tasks are clear and specific.
Assess the overall formatting of the to-do list, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
